channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Champat Rai denies resentment over resignation amid Ram Mandir donation probe
item.description: In the wake of an ongoing investigation into alleged embezzlement of funds meant for the Ram Mandir, Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust Treasurer Govind Dev Giri stated that Champat Rai, the tru...

item.title: First live footage of goblin shark expands its known range in deep ocean
item.description: Researchers have captured the first live footage of goblin sharks (Mitsukurina owstoni) in their natural deep-sea habitat, significantly expanding the species' known range and depth. The historic obse...

item.title: Tourism Calgary Launches Colorful Campaign to Promote City in Toronto Subway Station
item.description: Tourism Calgary has launched a six-week advertising campaign called 'Colours of Calgary' to attract more visitors from Ontario, particularly Torontonians. The initiative involved transforming a downto...

item.title: Australia's Health Spending and Chronic Disease Challenges
item.description: A new government report reveals Australia spent $270.5 billion on health in 2023-24, with Australians now living longer despite challenges from chronic diseases and rising out-of-pocket costs. Life ex...

item.title: UK Government Faces Pressure to Decide Jackdaw Gas Field's Future Amid Energy Security and Climate Concerns
item.description: The owners of the Jackdaw gas platform in the North Sea have urged the UK government to approve its production to prevent potential winter fuel shortages. Adura's CEO Neil McCulloch emphasized that th...

item.title: ADB Maintains Pakistan's Growth Outlook at 3.7% for Current Fiscal Year
item.description: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) has maintained its forecast for Pakistan's economic growth at 3.7% for the current fiscal year, slightly higher than the government's estimate of 3.5%. However, the AD...

item.title: Telstra Outage: Major Network Crash Disrupts Services Across Australia
item.description: Telstra experienced a major national service crash on Wednesday morning, disrupting phone services, internet, and train networks. A software defect caused the outage, leaving some customers unable to ...

item.title: Japan Commences 21st Discharge of Fukushima Nuclear Wastewater into the Ocean
item.description: Japan has initiated the 21st release of treated nuclear wastewater from the Fukushima Daiichi Nuclear Power Plant into the Pacific Ocean, a process that has been ongoing since 2023. The decision has s...

item.title: Dangote Chooses Lamu Island for KSh 2.2 Trillion Oil Refinery to Serve East Africa
item.description: Aliko Dangote Industries has selected Lamu Island off Kenya's coast as the site for a massive oil refinery costing up to KSh 2.2 trillion. The project, set to process 700,000 barrels of crude daily, a...

item.title: Jocelyn Lane: A Glamorous Journey Through 1950s and 1960s Hollywood
item.description: Jocelyn Lane, born Jocelyn Olga Bolton in 1937, was a British actress and model renowned for her sultry beauty and career spanning the 1950s and 1960s. Raised in Vienna, Austria, she gained fame as a ...

item.title: Tanzanian Court Charges Baba Levo with One Million Shilling Bribery
item.description: A Tanzanian court has formally charged Baba Levo with soliciting a one million shilling bribe, marking a significant development in the country's anti-corruption efforts. The case highlights the ongoi...

item.title: Student Seized with Army-issued Handgun in South Cotabato
item.description: A student was apprehended by local authorities in South Cotabato after being found in possession of an Army-issued handgun. The incident, which occurred on July 9, 2026, has raised concerns about fire...

item.title: Fitness Influencer Connor Murphy Dies After Drowning in Thailand
item.description: American fitness influencer Connor Murphy, 32, died after drowning in a lake near a luxury rental property in Thailand's Samut Prakan province. His body was recovered by rescue divers about 20 meters ...

item.title: BBC Expert Advises UK Travelers to Compare Prices and Check Terms When Booking Holidays in 2026
item.description: BBC travel expert Holly Hamilton warns UK travelers to avoid booking their first holiday option without thorough research. In an interview on BBC Morning Live, Hamilton shares strategies for saving mo...

item.title: Chiefs' New Defender Moloisane Seen as Key Replacement for McCarthy
item.description: Former Kaizer Chiefs defender Tefu Mashamaite has endorsed the signing of Thabo Moloisane, stating he is a perfect replacement for departed player Aden McCarthy. The new recruit, who joined Chiefs as ...

item.title: US-Iran Escalate Naval Tensions Over Strategic Waterway
item.description: The United States and Iran escalated military tensions on Thursday as both nations exchanged strikes over the strategic Strait of Hormuz, a critical waterway for global oil shipments. The conflict, wh...

item.title: Five Police Sergeants Face Corruption Charges After Alleged Bribery Demand
item.description: Five police sergeants attached to the Vanderbijlpark SAPS Task Team have appeared in court on charges of corruption and extortion after allegedly demanding a R100,000 bribe from a local business owner...

item.title: Kanlaon Volcano Eruption Causes Ashfall in Cebu, Leading to School Closures
item.description: A moderately explosive eruption of Kanlaon Volcano on July 9, 2026, resulted in ashfall across parts of Cebu, prompting widespread school closures and work suspensions. The eruption, which lasted thre...

item.title: NMB Launches Agricultural Equipment Financing to Boost Tanzanian Farming
item.description: The National Microfinance Bank (NMB) has launched a new initiative to provide agricultural equipment financing to farmers across Tanzania, aiming to enhance productivity and support the country's agri...

item.title: Justin Baldoni and Wife Emily Reflect on Healing After 'It Ends With Us' Settlement
item.description: Justin Baldoni and his wife, Emily Baldoni, have made their first public statement in nearly two years following the resolution of the legal dispute tied to the 2024 film 'It Ends With Us.' In an Inst...
